title: Fed interest rate decision April 2026: Fed holds rates steady amid historic dissent
snippet: FOMC voted 8-4 to hold benchmark rate at 3.5%-3.75%. First time since 1992 four members dissented. 3 dissenters wanted easing bias removed, 1 (Miran) wanted 25bp cut. Statement: 'Inflation is elevated, in part reflecting recent increase in global energy prices.' Powell announced he will stay on Board of Governors indefinitely.
tag_reason: FOMC decision with historic 8-4 split is new event on 4/29
